name: CAVCO INDUSTRIES, INC.
summary: Cavco Industries, Inc. designs and produces factory-built homes, including manufactured homes, modular homes, park model RVs, vacation cabins, and commercial modular structures. Headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona, the company operates 31 homebuilding production lines across the U.S. and Mexico, distributing through independent retailers and 80 Company-owned stores. Subsidiaries CountryPlace Acceptance Corp. provides mortgage financing and Standard Casualty Company offers property and casualty insurance for manufactured home owners.

products.name: Manufactured Homes
products.description: HUD code factory-built homes ranging from 500 to 3,300 sq ft, offered in various floor plans and customizations.

products.name: Modular Homes
products.description: Single and multi-section modular homes including ranch, split-level, Cape Cod, multi-family and multi-story styles.

products.name: Park Model RVs
products.description: ANSI-standard vacation dwellings under 400 sq ft used in planned communities, recreational parks and resorts.

products.name: Vacation Cabins
products.description: Factory-built vacation cabin structures for seasonal and recreational use.

products.name: Commercial Modular Structures
products.description: Factory-built commercial buildings including apartment buildings, hotels, schools, and military barracks.

products.name: CountryPlace Mortgage Services
products.description: Conforming, non-conforming mortgages and home-only loans for factory-built home purchasers.

products.name: Standard Casualty Insurance
products.description: Property and casualty insurance products primarily for manufactured home owners in Texas, Arizona, New Mexico and Nevada.

partnerships.description: CountryPlace is an approved FNMA seller/servicer for conforming mortgages.
CountryPlace is an approved FHLMC seller/servicer for conforming mortgages.
CountryPlace is an approved GNMA issuer of mortgage-backed securities.
CountryPlace is HUD-authorized to directly endorse FHA Title I and Title II mortgage insurance.
CountryPlace is an approved VA lender.
CountryPlace is approved under USDA Single Family Housing Guaranteed Loan Program.
